potion.name: Healing Potion
potion.description: Smells of mint and regret. Restores 1d6 health.

charm.name: Lucky Charm
charm.description: A rabbit's foot. +2 luck while equipped.

peddler.name: The Old Peddler's Cart
peddler.greeting: "Everything a doomed adventurer needs, friend. No refunds."

on_buy: say [dim]The peddler winks. "Wear it, don't pocket it."[/]

well_prepared.name: Well Prepared
well_prepared.description: Own a torch and a healing potion at the same time.

troll_slayer.name: Troll Slayer
troll_slayer.description: Defeat the bridge troll in combat.

silver_tongue.name: Silver Tongue
silver_tongue.description: Talk your way past the troll.

hoarder.name: Hoarder
hoarder.description: Hold 12 or more gold at once.

camp.title: The Camp
camp.text:
Dawn breaks over your camp at the mouth of the [bold]Cavern of Echoes[/]. An old peddler has parked his creaking cart beside your dead fire, entirely uninvited.

Legend says an [magenta]amulet[/] sleeps in the depths — and that no one who entered without light ever came back.

You have [yellow]{gold} gold[/], [red]{health} health[/], luck [cyan]{luck}[/].
on_first_enter: say [dim]Type 'help' at any prompt to see commands ('ach' shows achievements).[/]

do: say You feel warmth spread through your ribs. Health: [red]{health}[/]
say You dig around the fire pit and find two [yellow]gold coins[/]!

searched_camp.title: The Camp
searched_camp.text: Nothing else here but ash and cold coffee. The peddler pretends not to watch you. The cavern waits.

entrance.title: Cavern Entrance
entrance.text:
The air turns cold. Ahead, the passage splits.

To the [cyan]left[/], you hear water dripping. To the [cyan]right[/], a faint [green]glow[/]... and heavy breathing.

flooded_hall.title: The Flooded Hall
flooded_hall.text:
Your torch throws dancing shadows over a half-drowned hall. On a stone pedestal above the waterline rests an [bold]iron key[/].

Something long and pale moves beneath the black water. Reaching the pedestal will take a steady footing... or luck.

choices.text: Wade in carefully (agility check: 1d20 + luck vs 12)

do: say You move slow and silent. The water never stirs.
else: say You slip! Something [red]bites your leg[/] before you scramble out. (-3 health)

troll_bridge.title: The Troll Bridge
troll_bridge.text:
A rope bridge spans a glowing chasm. A [bold green]troll[/] blocks the way, picking its teeth with a femur.

[green]"Toll is five gold,"[/] it rumbles. [green]"Or five fingers. Your pick."[/]

do: say The troll bows with surprising grace and steps aside.
say You compliment its femur toothpick at length. The troll blushes [green]greener[/] and waves you through.
else: say [green]"Flattery,"[/] the troll yawns, [green]"is not legal tender."[/]

choices.text: Fight the troll (your 1d20 + luck vs its 1d20 + 4)

do: say You duck under its club and shove it into the chasm!
else: say The club catches your ribs. ([red]-{troll_damage} health[/])

sanctum.title: The Echoing Sanctum
sanctum.text:
A vast dome of crystal. Every footstep returns to you a hundred times.

In the center, behind a [bold]locked iron gate[/], the [magenta]Amulet of Echoes[/] floats above an altar.

choices.text: Unlock the gate with the iron key

do: say With a scream of metal, the gate tears from its hinges!
else: say The iron doesn't budge. Your palms bleed. (-1 health)

victory.title: Victory
victory.text:
The amulet settles cold against your chest, whispering every word you've ever said back to you.

You walk out of the Cavern of Echoes into the morning light. The peddler is already gone.

[bold bright_yellow]Final score: {score}[/]   [red]Health: {health}[/]   [yellow]Gold: {gold}[/]

death.title: Darkness
death.text:
Your wounds are too deep. The echoes carry your last breath into the dark, and keep it.

[dim]Final score: {score}[/]

hello.text: "Buying? Selling? Or just here to breathe my air?"

responses.text: What do you know about the cavern?

cavern.text: "Echoes down there repeat everything you say. Some say the amulet listens back. The troll on the bridge — big softie, if you know how to talk to him. Or if you have [yellow]five gold[/]."

cavern2.text: "The left passage floods. Things live in flood water. Bring [red]light[/] and [cyan]luck[/] — luck especially. That's why I sell charms, friend."

who.text: "A businessman. I set up shop wherever adventurers gather... briefly." He smiles with too many teeth.

briefly.text: "Well. You lot don't tend to come back, do you? No refunds."

advice.text: "Dig around your own fire pit before you go digging in caves." He taps his nose.
